skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video creation agent that generates short videos (5-120 seconds) from text prompts. Handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
skill.summary: Professional AI video production agent for creating product ads, social media content, brand videos, and explainers in 15-20 minutes.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: All 534 static analysis findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill is a legitimate CLI tool for AI video production. Shell command substitutions, config file access, and API key handling are standard patterns for bash-based CLI tools. Network requests go only to the legitimate pexo.ai service. No malicious patterns, credential exfiltration, or code injection vulnerabilities detected.

content.user_title: Create AI Videos from Text Prompts
content.value_statement: Transform text descriptions into professional short videos in 15-20 minutes without video editing skills. Pexo handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from text prompts in 15-20 minutes
Accept image, video, and audio uploads as reference materials
Handle scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music selection
Provide preview options for user selection before final render
Support iterative revisions based on user feedback
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be downloaded and uploaded manually
Requires Pexo API key and account credits to function
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Each API call consumes tokens and requires active internet connection

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for products by uploading product photos and describing the desired style. Ideal for e-commerce listings, social media ads, and brand content.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing professionals and small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content from simple text descriptions. Supports vertical 9:16 and square 1:1 aspect ratios.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Turn concepts and scripts into visual explainers with automatic shot composition and transitions. Upload reference images or diagrams for visual accuracy.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second product showcase video for [product name]. Highlight key features and benefits with upbeat music.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick start for users new to AI video generation

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Ad with Reference Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 15-second Instagram Story ad featuring this product photo <original-image>asset_id</original-image>. Use trending style and vertical format.

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story with Multiple Assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second brand story video. Use these reference materials: logo <original-image>logo_asset_id</original-image> and product shots <original-image>product_asset_id</original-image>. Maintain brand consistency with professional tone.
prompt_templates.scenario: Complex projects with multiple reference assets

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Revision Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: The video looks good but please: 1) Slow down the pacing, 2) Use warmer color tones, 3) Add text overlays for key points, 4) Change music to something more energetic.

output_examples.input: Create a 30-second product video for running shoes with dynamic angles
output: Preview options A and B ready for selection
Final video delivered with download URL

output_examples.input: Make a vertical TikTok video using this product photo <original-image>a_xyz789</original-image>
output: File uploaded successfully, asset ID: a_xyz789
Video generation in progress (9:16 aspect ratio)
Two preview variants available for review

best_practices: Copy user messages exactly when relaying to Pexo - only add asset tags for uploaded files, do not add your own creative details
Poll status every 60 seconds using pexo-project-get.sh, and process every event in recentMessages array
Always send the full video URL with all query parameters - truncated URLs will return 403 Forbidden
anti_patterns: Never call pexo-chat.sh while nextAction is WAIT - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details the user did not mention - Pexo's backend handles these professionally
Never send bare asset IDs without wrapping in proper tags like <original-image>asset_id</original-image>

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-30 seconds) typically complete in 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time. The skill polls automatically and notifies you when ready.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for uploads?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, jpeg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic, heif. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: Can I request revisions after the video is delivered?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide feedback using the same project_id and the skill will submit revision requests. Revisions follow the same polling workflow as the initial generation.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The skill will detect insufficient credits and provide instructions to purchase more. Visit pexo.ai/home, click Credits in the top-right, then Buy Credits > Extra Credits.

faq.question: Why can't I just provide a URL to an image instead of uploading?
faq.answer: Pexo cannot crawl external URLs. You must download the file first, then upload it using pexo-upload.sh which returns an asset ID to reference in your message.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are available?
faq.answer: Three aspect ratios are supported: 16:9 (landscape for YouTube), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Reels/Stories), and 1:1 (square for Instagram posts).
